content.en:
Outside the Yuangu Palace.

The First Divine Lord, the Second Divine Lord and the others were trembling at this moment, and they also felt the breath transmitted from the Yuan Gu Palace, which was far beyond the realm of the Supreme.

"What's that......"

The First Divine Lord shuddered.

"I don't know, it seems to be the breath of a treasure, could it be the Chaos Treasure on top of the Strongest Treasure?"

The First Demon Lord.

Nearly 3,000 Supremes of all races were terrified and stopped attacking.

There were even some Supremes who wanted to leave because they were afraid that something dangerous would happen next.

At the same time, the power of the Chaos Treasure of Fengyuan Tianpei invaded the cosmic origin space and began to fight with the cosmic origin.

On the unknown level, the Chaos Arcana confronted the Universe Origin, allowing the Universe Origin to consume part of its strength to suppress the Sealed Source Tianpei, which caused the power of the Universe Origin to begin to weaken.

Under this influence, the rules of the universe began to weaken, and the suppression of the supremes of the twelve universe epochs also weakened.

It can even be said that the difficulty of people's cultivation in the future will be reduced, it will not be difficult to break the limits of the universe, and the hope of the supreme beings will be greater.

Yuangu Palace.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu silently closed his eyes, feeling the tumbling power in his body, and he clearly felt that the suppression of him by the universe was gradually disappearing, or even completely gone.

"I can use my full strength!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said excitedly.

The Golden Light Supreme and other Supremes also shouted excitedly, the cosmic suppression disappeared, and they could truly burst out with their own strength.

At this time, the Lord of the Immortal Heaven proposed, "Lord of the Ancient Ages, we can exert our strength strong enough, do we want to kill all those Supremes?"

"No!" the Lord of the Yuan Gu shook his head, "You can't kill all those Supremes of the Thirteenth Universe Era, you should understand one thing, the Supremes are more special, the Supremes born in the Thirteenth Era, each Supreme has inherited the power of the Universe Origin, and they are equivalent to the incarnation of the Universe Origin exercising power in the universe. Once too many Supremes are killed, the power of these Supremes will be withdrawn by the Universe Origin, causing the power of the Universe Origin to increase, and in this way, it will be difficult for Fengyuan Tianpei to compete with the Universe Origin. However, killing a small number of Supremes can deter those Supremes, and in this way, they will not dare to sabotage our future plans!"

"Yes, then let's follow the plan of the Lord of the Primordial Ancients!"

The other supremes responded one after another.

......

Rumble!

The gate of the Yuangu Hall opened, and the divine arrays that protected this area of the Yuangu Hall also disappeared.

Whoa!!

A supreme flew out of the Yuan Gu Palace, and the leader of them was the Lord of the Yuan Gu.

Seeing the appearance of the Yuan Gu Zhi, the First God Lord, the First Demon Lord and other supremes were a little nervous, although the palpitating aura had disappeared, but the unknown situation in front of them made them feel deeply uncomfortable.

"First Divine Master, what should I do? I guess there will be a battle later!"

The First Demon Lord said.

"One battle is one battle, we have nearly 3,000 supremes here, and the supremes of the twelve universe epochs are only a few, even if they are strong in combat, but when they fight, maybe who will lose more! Maybe, the lord of the Yuan Gu and other supremes dare not fight, at most there will be a quarrel!"

The first god is the main way.

"I hope so!"

The First Demon Lord thought.

-------

"Supremes of all races, do you dare to attack here, do you want to start a war against us?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu asked in a cold voice.

The First Divine Lord stood up and shouted, "Lord of the Yuan Gu, what are you doing? So many Supremes are all gathered here, and such a divine array has been arranged, and there is also the aura just now, could it be the Chaos Treasure?"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu sneered: "First Divine Lord, what do these things have to do with you? Our agreement only includes one thing, that is, if we don't attack all races, it doesn't mean that we can't do other things. You're too lenient, aren't you?"

The First Divine Lord was a little unreasonable, and knew that it was useless to quarrel, so he said, "Then we will leave now!"

However, just as the First Divine Lord and other Supremes were about to leave, the Qi of the Supreme Lords of the Yuan Gu and other Supremes locked onto the First Divine Lord and other Supremes.

"Leave? If you attack our Yuangu Palace, you want to leave? We signed an agreement not to attack your clans, but you take the initiative to attack the door, it doesn't mean that we can't fight back, if you want to leave, just leave something!"

After saying that, the Lord of the Yuan Gu made a move.

"Yuan Gu Yin, fall!"

An astonishing Yuan Gu Seal fell from the void and suppressed the endless firmament.

The terrifying power made all the Supremes, including the First Divine Master, tremble.

"This ......"

The First Divine Lord had always thought that he was the First Supreme of the Universe, but now that he saw the action of the Lord of the Yuan Gu, he really realized how big the gap between the two sides was.

"The first form of Tiangang's battle method!"

"Celestial Battlebody!"

......

The First Divine Lord used a method and broke out his strongest attack, wanting to shake the Yuan Gu Seal.

It's not that he doesn't want to escape, but the Yuan Gu Yin locks him up, and he can't escape at all.

And the First Demon Lord also performed the first form of the Tiangang Battle Method, and together with the First Divine Lord, he fought against the Yuan Gu Yin.

However, under the huge gap in strength, the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord couldn't compete at all.

Bang!!!!

The devastating power swept through this area, instantly crushing the flesh of the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord into powder, and some of the supreme beings attached to it also instantly turned into nothingness.

Under just one blow, nearly a hundred Supremes were killed and hundreds were injured.

"Run!"

The other Supremes fled one after another, not daring to stay at all.

"No need to pursue!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu gave an order.

The other supremes nodded and did not pursue, otherwise with their strength, it would not be difficult to kill all of these supremes.

"The Lord of the Yuan Gu, the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord don't seem to be dead, their breath still exists between heaven and earth!" Jin Guang Tianzun said.

"Yes, although I annihilated them in an instant, their souls escaped, and it should have been a rare soul supreme treasure to protect their souls and regenerate their souls in another place. However, this kind of supreme treasure can't be used a few times, forget it, it's just two ants, and if they die, they will die! I just have some interest in the secret technique that the two of them cast, and they have increased their combat power so much in an instant. "

The main road of the Yuangu.

The Radiant Supreme of the Seventh Universe Era said: "Lord of the Yuan Gu, if I guess correctly, the First God Lord and the First Demon Lord should be using the Tiangang Battle Technique, but the Yuntan Heavenly Monarch's famous battle technique!"

"Yuntan Heavenly Monarch? is the detached person you mentioned earlier?

The Lord of the Yuan Gu wondered.

Yaoguang Supreme nodded and said: "Yuntan Heavenly Monarch is a legendary figure in the Seventh Universe Era, a loose cultivator, but when he was in the Supreme Realm, he was invincible in the Seventh Universe Era, and then disappeared, and then a world appeared in the abyss, which should have been built by him, and even the Supreme could not shake the slightest, and its power had exceeded the Supreme level, plus he disappeared between heaven and earth, it should be transcendent." "

"I really envy Yuntan Tianjun, but once our plan is completely completed, we also have hope of transcendence!"

The Lord of the Yuan Gu said.

"Yes, we can transcend too!"

The other Supremes looked forward to it.
